Policy & Disclaimer

Legal guidelines, transparency, and operating principles

← Back to Home

📄 Public Disclaimer & Policy Notice

Issued in the interest of transparency and legality, KES Updates operates under the following guidelines. This policy ensures that all students, visitors, and collaborators understand the nature, scope, and limitations of this platform.

  1. 1

    Independent Platform

    KES Updates is a student-managed page and not an official body; references to the college are for identification only.

  2. 2

    Legal Compliance

    Content is shared under Article 19(1)(a) of the Constitution of India, IT Act 2000, Digital Media Ethics, and applicable laws.

  3. 3

    Consent & Content Control

    No content is published without free, informed consent; defamatory, unlawful, obscene, hateful, or privacy-violating material is strictly avoided.

  4. 4

    Collaborations

    Mentions, reposts, or collaborations do not imply endorsement or legal association.

  5. 5

    Liability & Purpose

    KES Updates disclaims liability for third-party views; content is shared in good faith for informational and recreational purposes.

📜 Read the full KES Updates Policy on Instagram
